description: An analyst needs to create a funnel visualization to see the drop-off rates between key steps on the website (e.g., from homepage to product page to cart to purchase).

nodes.task_description: Define the stages of the conversion funnel.

expected_outcome.value: Agent defines the steps of the funnel.

nodes.task_description: In the analytics tool, create a new funnel report using the defined stages.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully configures the funnel report.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the funnel visualization to identify the biggest drop-off point.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the step in the process where the most users are leaving.
